description: This achievement is gained upon completing the following raids in the Sul Vius: Demiplane of Life:

title: Dance Dance Retribution
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Anashti Sul, Enslaver of Souls'

requirements.label: Avoid having any member of your party contract Mortal Decay.

title: Destruction of Purity
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Anashti Sul, Enslaver of Souls'

requirements.label: Destroy all shards of health, preventing them from healing Anashti Sul.

title: Et tu, Kebaber?
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Anashti Sul, Damsel of Decay'

requirements.label: Allow Anashti Sul to charm four undead pets simultaneously.

title: Finish What You Started
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Stem the Tide'

requirements.label: Defeat Akkapan without the event resetting.

title: Gifts Unopened
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Anashti Sul, Damsel of Decay'

requirements.label: Never cure the Gifts of Endless Life.

title: Golem is as Golem Does
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Anashti Sul, Enslaver of Souls'

requirements.label: Defeat Anashti Sul after facing the Enraged Guardian of Sul.

title: Half Traps
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Emollious'

requirements.label: Never allow the boss to enter any two of the traps Jerill set for him.

title: He Stands Alone
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Grummus'

requirements.label: Defeat Grummus with all Heroes of Bertoxxulous dead.

title: Impure Fury
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Stem the Tide'

requirements.label: Defeat Akkapan Adan with no player dying from his attacks while under the effects of Pure Fury.

title: Keep the Balance
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Vim and Vigor'

requirements.label: Do not allow Vim or Vigor's health to differ by more than 3%.

title: My Grandmother Dropped My Shield, Once
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Grummus'

requirements.label: Defeat Grummus the first time you drop his shield aura.

title: No Heroes
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Anashti Sul, Lady of Life'

requirements.label: Allow none of Anashti's heroes to be relifed.

title: No Relife for Allies
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Anashti Sul, Lady of Life'

requirements.label: Allow none of your raid to be relifed by Holistic Health.

title: No Restoration
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Grannus of the Cleansing Steam'

requirements.label: Do not allow any healing ooze to heal Grannus.

title: No Unity
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Grannus of the Cleansing Steam'

requirements.label: Do not allow a Radiant Steam Soother to spawn.

title: Non Transferable
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Grannus of the Cleansing Steam'

requirements.label: Ensure that every instance of Transference of Harm is removed near Grannus.

title: None May Fall
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Emollious'

requirements.label: Allow all of the first wave of adds to be buffed by the boss and still win.

title: None Shall Stand
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'High Bokon Boromas'

requirements.label: Kill High Bokon Boromas when he has no allies alive.

title: Ritual Defeat
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Vim and Vigor'

requirements.label: Defeat all ritualists before they complete their task.

title: Seven at One Blow
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Anashti Sul, Damsel of Decay'

requirements.label: Kill seven Bokon with a single ooze.

title: Strong to the Core
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'High Bokon Boromas'

requirements.label: Kill High Bokon Boromas while every member of your party is affected by Decay IV.

title: The Crazy Eight
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Wither and Decay'

requirements.label: Always have at least 8 players near both bosses.

title: The Quick and the Dead
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Grummus'

title: Third Time's the Charm
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Wither and Decay'

requirements.label: Kill the wrong boss two times in a row before killing the correct boss.

title: Uncursed!
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Anashti Sul, Lady of Life'

requirements.label: Never let Curse of Health mature.

title: An Ounce of Fetid Flesh (Crypt of Sul)
description: Recover part of residents that they have misplaced.

title: Bright Baubles (Plane of Health)
description: Gather some of the bright stones that form here.

title: Deadman's Band (Sul Vius: Demiplane of Life)
description: Recover items lost by band members during the deadman's party.

title: Deadman's Dinner (Sul Vius: Demiplane of Life)
description: Recover leftovers from the deadman's party.

title: Dregs of Decay (Crypt of Sul)
description: Gather items left over by residents of Decay.

requirements.label: How to Safely Dissect a Corpse

title: Fallen Footwear (Sul Vius: Demiplane of Decay)
description: Recover lost footwear.

title: Gathering of Slime (Crypt of Decay)
description: Gather the putrid remnants of various slimes.

title: Grails (Plane of Health)
description: Recover potentially holy drinking vessels.

title: Idols of Rot (Crypt of Sul)
description: Gather items used in worship.

title: Knives of Sacrifice (Crypt of Decay)
description: Gather tools used to sacrifice victims.

title: Markers of Death (Sul Vius: Demiplane of Decay)
description: Gather tokens used to indicate the disposition of the dead.

title: Medal from the Living (Sul Vius: Demiplane of Decay)
description: Gather medals given to the newly dead to indicate their worth in life.

title: Night Crawlers (Sul Vius: Demiplane of Decay)
description: Gather the lowest forms of life.

title: Putrid Poisons (Crypt of Decay)
description: Gather various poisons used by denizens.

title: Raiments of Rot (Crypt of Sul)
description: Recover clothing worn by the residents of the plane.

title: Reborn into Faith
description: In the Demiplane of Decay, relife enforces faith.

title: Reborn of Faith
description: In the Demiplane of Life, only the faithful earn relife.

title: Relics of Decay
description: The crusty home of Bertoxxulous, complete with rotting relics.

title: Relics of Health
description: The home of Rodcet Nife, a calm and relaxing place to seek relics.

title: Relics of Sul
description: The heart of the Demiplanes of Sul, certainly full of unusual relics.

title: Rotting Remnants (Crypt of Decay)
description: Recover body parts misplaced by the residents.

title: Ruins of Decay (Plane of Health)
description: Gather items taken in battle against Decay, but since forgotten.

title: See the Broken Mirror
description: Complete all of the following achievements:

title: Shards of Life (Plane of Health)
description: Recover various pieces of the cynosures that have broken off, but since healed.

title: Texts of Eternity (Sul Vius: Demiplane of Life)
